title: Uruguayan Fried Rice
description: A twist on traditional fried rice, featuring a Uruguayan flair with garlicky flavor. This dish is perfect for a quick and easy dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat the garlicky oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the sausage.
Add the frozen peas, shredded cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Stir-fry everything together for 2-3 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the peas are tender.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and serve immediately.
